headline: Prediction-Oil Will Stay Above $90 Through 2026 and These 2 Stocks Will Profit Most
summary: If oil stays "higher for longer," the biggest winners won't just be the most talked-about tickers--they'll be the companies built to turn elevated crude into surging free cash flow. This article highlights two U.S. producers with clear operating leverage and near-term catalysts if the Hormuz disruption keeps markets tight through 2026.

headline: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Inflation worries dragged the major averages down on Wednesday, with the Dow Industrials falling about 768 points to its closing low for 2026.
